Domestic Cat

INFOBOXTOP Kingdom Animalia Phylum Chordata Class Mammalia

BODYONE the cat is a small domesticated carnivorous mammal and it is the only domesticated species of the family Felidae and is commonly kept as a house pet by many people around the whole world today.

BODYTWO domestic cats are valued by humans for companionship and for their ability to hunt rodents; about sixty distinct breeds are recognized.

FIGBOX a tabby cat

BODYTHREE the cat is similar in anatomy to the other felid species with a strong flexible body and quick reflexes and sharp retractable claws well suited to hunting small prey.

S42

SCORELINE this headline flows beside the narrow forty pixel score box.
